property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: name
property.value: Castle Town (Chapter 2 end)

property.name: image
property.value: Castle Town map Chapter 2 end.png

property.name: description
property.value: Offers to play various tracks from the game's [[:Category:Music|soundtrack]].

property.name: page
property.value: Sweet Cap'n Cakes

property.name: description
property.value: Sells items to the [[party]]. Also accepts [[Spamton NEO]]'s [[Shadow Crystal]] if they received it.

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] can train their battle skills here through various challenges.

property.name: page
property.value: Party Dojo

property.name: description
property.value: A restaurant where the [[party]] can fuse their [[item]]s and obtain a [[Spin Cake]].

property.name: page
property.value: Top Bakery

property.name: description
property.value: Allows the party to place their current [[recruit]]s at each table.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]]'s home. [[Kris]], [[Susie]], and [[Lancer]] have individual rooms, while [[King]] is imprisoned in the basement.

property.name: page
property.value: Ralsei's castle

property.name: description
property.value: Contains topics regarding [[recruit]]s, [[item]] storage, and the game's [[Config#Controls|controls]].

properties.property: Mama Miba! Welcome to TOP Bakery! Our special chefs spin baked goods at the TOP of their class!

property.name: description
property.value: ''2F : LIVING QUARTERS''

property.name: description
property.value: BF : LIVING QUARTERS FOR BAD GUYS

properties.property: '''First time after returning from [[Cyber World]]''' You touched the light... You thought about how you can't go back to the Cyber World anymore. You considered this carefully! '''Subsequent interactions''' After a long day, the town has grown once again. You are filled with a certain power... '''Weird Route''' After a long day, you have returned to the castle town. But, you still feel the power in your hands...

property.name: description
property.value: [[Queen]] appears at the entrance and comments on the state of the town. Her dialogue varies depending on whether the [[party]] recruited all possible [[Darkner]]s, recruited some, or recruited none.

property.name: description
property.value: Compares Castle Town to the one he made in Minecrap.

property.name: description
property.value: Is building up the area to resemble the [[Great Board]].

property.name: page
property.value: Mr. Elegance

property.name: description
property.value: States that they do not understand taxes and values due to being a worm.

property.name: description
property.value: Had its clothes removed. [[Ralsei]] demands someone fix it, while [[Susie]] thinks about what [[Noelle]] would dress it up with.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the new customers and advertises a free sample of the mannequin's clothes for $4.99.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments that they have been training and asks if [[Kris]] is impressed.

property.name: description
property.value: Circles around the room and makes yelping noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Reminisces about battling the [[party]] and states that they have never met the "horned girl".

property.name: description
property.value: Reminisces about battling [[Kris]] and wonders if they will meet [[Noelle]] again.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the state of [PLAYER]Town.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses joy at seeing new faces.

property.name: description
property.value: Thanks [[Kris]] for the new town, but refuses to enter the restaurant.

property.name: description
property.value: Thanks [[Kris]] for getting rid of [[Queen]], and states that they are keeping their new form.

property.name: description
property.value: Thanks the [[party]] for a wider space to clean and comments on the people's clean hearts.

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses how nice it is to have friends that like "good clean fun".

property.name: description
property.value: Offers advice on battles, including grazing and hitbox size.

property.name: page
property.value: Battle's Master

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on the [[Werewerewire]] nearby.

property.name: description
property.value: Refuses to forgive the [[party]] for sparing it unless they can beat it in a fight.

property.name: description
property.value: Laments how their "power level" is falling behind the others.

property.name: description
property.value: Malius offers to [[fuse]] certain [[items]] together to make new ones.

property.name: description
property.value: Serves as a waiter for the Cafe.

property.name: description
property.value: Swatch explains that his men have evicted [[Top Chef]] from the [[Cafe]] and allows the [[party]] to check their [[recruit]]s in his place.

property.name: description
property.value: Requests [[Kris]] make the [[Cafe]] into an animal cafe, with them as one of the animals.

property.name: page
property.value: Tasque Manager

property.name: description
property.value: The narration states that it seems well-behaved.

property.name: description
property.value: States that he will settle down and give his riches to the weak.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on [[Nubert]]'s one-of-a-kind nature.

property.name: page
property.value: Little ball

property.name: description
property.value: Expresses hopefulness in making new friends.

property.name: description
property.value: Exclaims that [[Trashy]] is scary.

property.name: page
property.value: Royal Coat Rack

property.name: description
property.value: Is "voilently" protecting the jail.

property.name: page
property.value: C. Round

property.name: description
property.value: Introduces themselves as "Goulden Sam".

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: Still behind bars and dressed as animals, but they have grown to enjoy their new home.

property.name: page
property.value: Former Kings

property.name: description
property.value: States that the prison is nice.

property.name: page
property.value: Goulden Sam

property.name: description
property.value: The animals state that, as cultural exchange, they have decided to dress as kings.

property.name: page
property.value: Cage Animals

property.name: description
property.value: Warns the [[party]] about [[Queen]], despite the [[party]] having already met her. Queen arrives soon after and has a conversation with King. If the party is missing [[recruit]]s, King simply states that they have "left them behind" and refuses to talk further.

property.name: description
property.value: Is seen relaxing next to [[Queen]]. Lancer explains that Queen acts like a "girldad" to him.

property.name: description
property.value: Is seen relaxing next to [[Lancer]]. She requests [[Kris]] to give her regards to [[Noelle]] and [[Berdly]].

property.name: description
property.value: Laments their constant relegation as a fan.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears here if not obtained in [[Cyber World]].

property.name: description
property.value: Lancer offers a Lancer Cookie if the [[party]] does not already have one.

property.name: page
property.value: Lancer Cookie

property.name: description
property.value: Having relocated here, Top Chef offers to replenish the [[party]]'s Spin Cake if they do not already have one.

property.name: page
property.value: Spin Cake

property.name: description
property.value: Going into the light takes the [[party]] back to the School.
